queries.question: What is the common school grade for all districts?
queries.sql: SELECT School_Grades.grade  from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id   GROUP BY District_School_Grades.school_grade_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT District_School_Grades.district_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  District)

queries.question: For every district, list the description of school grades.
queries.sql: select district.name , school_grades.description from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?district_school_grades a :District_School_Grades .
  ?school_grades a :School_Grades .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasSchool_Grades ?school_grades .
  ?district a :Districts .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasDistrict ?district .
  ?district p:name ?name .
  ?school_grades p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each district, what is the corresponding school grade?
queries.sql: select district.name , school_grades.grade from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?grade WHERE {
  ?district_school_grades a :District_School_Grades .
  ?school_grades a :School_Grades .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasSchool_Grades ?school_grades .
  ?district a :Districts .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasDistrict ?district .
  ?district p:name ?name .
  ?school_grades p:grade ?grade .
}

queries.question: List the common descriptions of school grades for all districts.
queries.sql: SELECT School_Grades.description  from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id   GROUP BY District_School_Grades.school_grade_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT District_School_Grades.district_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  District)

queries.question: List the school grades and their descriptions that we have in each district.
queries.sql: SELECT School_Grades.grade, School_Grades.description  from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id   GROUP BY District_School_Grades.school_grade_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT District_School_Grades.district_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  District)

queries.question: List the school grades and their descriptions that we have in each district.
queries.sql: select district.name , school_grades.grade , school_grades.description from District_School_Grades join School_Grades on District_School_Grades.school_grade_id = School_Grades.id join District on District_School_Grades.district_id = District.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?grade ?description WHERE {
  ?district_school_grades a :District_School_Grades .
  ?school_grades a :School_Grades .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasSchool_Grades ?school_grades .
  ?district a :Districts .
  ?district_school_grades p:hasDistrict ?district .
  ?district p:name ?name .
  ?school_grades p:grade ?grade .
  ?school_grades p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the school grades for every district.
List the description of school grades that every district has.
List the school grades and their descriptions that we have in each district.
